response.step_by_step_log: Identified the video as a 3D VTuber stream featuring a limbo game. Detected a musical performance of 'Cutie Panther' beginning at 04:38 with on-screen credit. Searched for 'Cutie Panther Love Live Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully found the lyrics corresponding to the snippet performed in the video.
response.global_summary: A 3D VTuber stream featuring a limbo game segment, followed by a musical performance of the song 'Cutie Panther' at the end of the stream.

scenes.description: VTubers playing a limbo game with background music, but no vocal singing.
VTubers perform the song 'Cutie Panther'. The song title appears on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Raora Panther, Moona Hoshinova, Nerissa Ravencroft
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
捕まえちゃう! 
(どこにいるの? ムリよムリよ どこにいたってムリよ) 
捕まえちゃう! 
(だれといるの? ダメよダメよ わたし以外はだめよ)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'll catch you! 
(Where are you? It's impossible, it's impossible, it's impossible no matter where you are) 
I'll catch you! 
(Who are you with? No, no, you can't be with anyone else but me)
